calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:28am and concluding at 9:38am.

Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union was present represented by Roger Jackson in court.
Defendant Georgia Antonoglou not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees.

Court is not inclined to grant attorney fees on this matter. Plaintiff was informed he would have to bring a seperate motion if he would like to be awarded fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff WILLIAM COOPER who was on zoom and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, and against Defendant Georgia Antonoglou as follows:

Damages: $39,167.22
Prejudgment Interest: $3,543.74
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $674.08
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $43,385.04

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
